description: Replace asyncio.ensure_future() with FastAPI BackgroundTasks to fix email notifications being cancelled on Render free tier before they complete.
steps: In app/routers/exam.py, add BackgroundTasks import from fastapi and add background_tasks parameter to submit_exam.
Replace asyncio.ensure_future() calls with background_tasks.add_task() calls.
Convert _schedule_followup_safe to a sync function since it only uses sync get_db().
Remove the _send_email_safe, _send_whatsapp_safe, _schedule_followup_safe async wrappers and replace with simpler versions compatible with BackgroundTasks.
Remove import asyncio if no longer used.
acceptance_criteria: submit_exam uses BackgroundTasks parameter instead of asyncio.ensure_future
Email, WhatsApp, and follow-up notifications are scheduled via background_tasks.add_task
No asyncio.ensure_future calls remain in exam.py
All existing tests continue to pass
findings: All 37 tests pass. Replaced asyncio.ensure_future with FastAPI BackgroundTasks in submit_exam. Removed 3 async wrapper functions (_send_email_safe, _send_whatsapp_safe, _schedule_followup_safe). Created sync _schedule_followup function. BackgroundTasks guarantees execution after response is sent, preventing task cancellation on Render free tier.
